response.justification: Bogdan has strong technical depth, extensive experience in developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, frameworks), and clear leadership in open-source and knowledge-sharing, but lacks explicit evidence of people management, organizational change leadership, or mobile platform expertise — key requirements for this role.
strengths: Extensive hands-on experience building developer tools (test runners, CI/CD, code generators)
Proven track record of open-source contributions and technical mentorship via workshops
Broad technical stack spanning mobile, web, and systems programming with DevOps infrastructure experience
concerns: No clear evidence of formal people management or team leadership responsibilities
Limited documentation of mobile platform expertise despite role focus on mobile ecosystem
Missing explicit experience leading organizational change or strategic roadmap planning
